summary:
The patient’s symptoms—fever, joint pain, headache, nuchal rigidity—and recent tick exposure are highly suggestive of Lyme disease. Treatment with amoxicillin is recommended as it is safe and effective during pregnancy.  

Note: This summary focuses only on clinically significant findings related directly to diagnosis and management decisions based on available information from the case presentation. It does not include irrelevant details such as demographic data beyond what affects care planning.

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{Amoxicillin}}$
